title: fistularia minor
intro: Fistularia minor, also known as the minor sea fan or coral tree, is a type of marine alga or seaweed that belongs to the family Alcyoniidae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Fistularia minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Fistularia minor can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support skin health and immune function.
